name: Lenis — Smooth Momentum Scroll
description: Replaces native scroll with buttery inertia-based smooth scrolling. Pairs perfectly with GSAP ScrollTrigger.
body:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/lenis@1.2.3/dist/lenis.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    var lenis = new Lenis({ duration: 1.15, easing: function(t){ return Math.min(1, 1.001 - Math.pow(2, -10 * t)); }, smoothWheel: true });
    function raf(time) { lenis.raf(time); requestAnimationFrame(raf); }
    requestAnimationFrame(raf);
    // Expose for GSAP ScrollTrigger sync
    window.__lenis = lenis;
  });
</script>
